name: @prune/speculative-pipeline
description: E5 — Speculative Tool Pipeline (PASTE: Parallel-Apply Speculative Tool Execution). Host-side speculator: while the agent generates the next tool call, predict the top-K likely next READ-ONLY calls (transition model + caller candidates), execute them in parallel against a sandboxed worktree, and reconcile by canonical-input byte-equality when the real call lands. A hit collapses the round-trip latency and keeps the session inside the prompt-cache window; a miss costs only host CPU, never tokens. Budget-governed, SLO-killable, equivalence-verified. No regex, eligibility-gated to pure-read tools, deterministic accounting.
